data.title: Binance Alpha Lists MemeCore (M), Airdrop Begins
data.description: Binance announced on X that Binance Alpha has now listed MemeCore (M). Eligible users can now claim an airdrop of 1,000 M tokens in two phases:Phase 1 (first 18 hours): Users with at least 214 Binance Alpha Points can claim the airdrop.Phase 2 (last 6 hours): Users with at least 140 Binance Alpha Points can claim the airdrop on a first-come, first-served basis until the airdrop pool is fully distributed or the airdrop event expires.Claiming the airdrop will consume 15 Binance Alpha Points and users must confirm their claims on the Alpha Events page within 24 hours; otherwise it will be deemed that users have given up claiming the airdrop.

data.title: Gate launches xStocks US stock zone: Opening up the tokenized US stock contract market
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Gate officially launched the xStocks US stock trading zone, supporting both spot and contract markets. The first batch of support includes 8 popular US stock targets including COINX, NVDAX, CRCLX, AAPLX, METAX, HOODX, TSLAX, GOOGLX, etc. Users can directly trade tokenized US stocks through crypto assets such as USDT. At the same time, Gate Alpha has also opened the xStocks trading function. The first batch of online targets include MSTRx, CRCLx, SPYx, NVDAx, TSLAx, and AAPLx, further enriching the user's choice space in on-chain asset trading and strategy exploration.
Gate xStocks US stock zone adopts a compliant physical asset tokenization model. All online tokens correspond to publicly traded stocks, have full asset collateral, support free transfer and on-chain transactions, and can achieve seamless integration across blockchains and multiple ecosystems. Gate US stock trading is open to global users, has no KYC restrictions, supports 24/7 all-weather trading and other functions, greatly reducing the investment threshold.
With the Gate brand upgrade to Gate.com in 2025, the platform's spot trading volume and liquidity ranked second in the world, and the contract market grew steadily, ranking among the top five in the world.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation Transfers 1,000 ETH to Internal Address
data.description: According to PANews, the Ethereum Foundation's development team has internally transferred 1,000 ETH, valued at approximately $2.6 million, to the address 0xc061...0B6d. This address currently holds 15,000 ETH, with a total value of around $39 million.

data.title: Ethereum Eyes Key Resistance As Price Reclaims $2,550 –  Here Are The Levels To Watch
data.description:
Ethereum (ETH) has surged 7. 5% in the daily timeframe to break above a key resistance level for the first time in weeks. Following its breakout, some analysts forecasted that a retest of the range highs could be around the corner. Related Reading: Bitcoin Holds Key Level Amid $108,000 Rejection, But Analysts Suggest Caution This Quarter Ethereum Reclaims Crucial Area On Wednesday, Ethereum jumped over 7% from its local low to the $2,550 mark, setting the stage to reclaim another crucial resistance
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/ethereum/ethereum-eyes-key-resistance-as-price-reclaims-2550-here-are-the-levels-to-watch/

data.title: MemeCore (M) is now available on Binance Alpha
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Binance Alpha has launched MemeCore (M). Eligible users can use Binance Alpha points to claim 1,000 M tokens airdrop after the launch. This airdrop will be distributed in two phases: Phase 1 (first 18 hours): users with at least 214 Alpha points can claim; Phase 2 (last 6 hours): users with at least 140 Alpha points can participate, first come first served, until the airdrop pool is full or the event ends. Claiming the airdrop will consume 15 Binance Alpha points.

data.title: Evolution of Money: From Shiny Coins to Smart Contracts
data.description:
What do seashells, gold coins, paper bills, and Bitcoin all have in common? They’re all part of the wild, weird, and surprisingly creative evolution of money —a story that stretches from bartering goats to scanning QR codes in coffee shops. Money isn’t some fixed, one-size-fits-all invention. It’s a tool we keep upgrading as our world—and our tech—changes. And it has changed
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/07/03/evolution-of-money-from-shiny-coins-to-smart-contracts/

data.title: AT&T Wireless Account Lets You Lock Your Phone Like a Vault
data.description:
AT&T Inc. , one of the largest telecommunications providers in the U. S. , has rolled out a new security feature called Wireless Account Lock, giving customers the ability to protect their accounts from SIM swapping attacks
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/07/03/att-wireless-account-lets-you-lock-your-phone-like-a-vault/

data.title: Quantum-Resistant Encryption Lands in Apple and Microsoft Updates
data.description:
Apple Inc. , the American tech giant, has announced that its upcoming operating system updates for Mac will include support for quantum-secure key exchange algorithms, enabling enhanced encryption when connecting to TLS 1. 3 servers that offer the same level of security. The announcement was made during Apple’s recent Worldwide Developers Conference, where the company outlined plans to integrate quantum-resistant encryption into its upcoming software
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/07/03/quantum-resistant-encryption-lands-in-apple-and-microsoft-updates/

data.title: A whale bought $3.645 million worth of ETH an hour ago
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, a whale bought 1,406 ETH at an average price of $2,592.47 on the chain an hour ago, with a transaction amount of $3.645 million. The address has conducted three swing operations in the past month, with a current record of 2 wins and 1 loss, and a cumulative loss of $198,000.

data.title: UXLINK Increases Holdings in Bitcoin and UXLINK Tokens
data.description: According to Foresight News, Web3 social platform and infrastructure provider UXLINK announced via Twitter that it has increased its holdings by 1.37 BTC and 468,000 UXLINK tokens, valued at approximately $696,000. The company also stated its intention to continue allocating 40% of its monthly profits towards purchasing BTC and UXLINK tokens.
